heading: General civil penalty
label: 31309 General civil penalty
text: Except as otherwise provided in this chapter, a person violating this chapter or a regulation prescribed under this chapter is liable to the United States Government for a civil penalty of not more than $10,000.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)31309NewSection 31309 provides for a civil penalty of not more than $10,000 for a violation of this chapter or a regulation prescribed under this chapter.
